title: Irish Stew with Shiitake Mushrooms
description: A hearty and flavorful Irish stew made with tender beef, shiitake mushrooms, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced potatoes and carrots; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced shiitake mushrooms; cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the Irish stew beef; cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the beef broth, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Add the red wine (if using); bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 2-3 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh thyme.
